ucs.title: [LLM] POLONIUM CreepyDrive / CreepyBox / CreepySnail — PowerShell C2 over OneDrive & Dropbox APIs
ucs.description: Hunts POLONIUM's signature custom backdoors (CreepyDrive uses OneDrive, CreepyBox/CreepySnail use Dropbox/Mega) which abuse cloud-storage APIs as a bidirectional C2 channel via PowerShell. The technique pair T1102.002 + T1567.002 + T1588.002 is the defining tradecraft Microsoft and ESET attributed to Plaid Rain since Feb 2022 against Israeli critical-manufacturing, IT and defense targets.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell_ise.exe") AND (Processes.process="*graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/drive*" OR Processes.process="*api.onedrive.com*" OR Processes.process="*content.dropboxapi.com*" OR Processes.process="*api.dropboxapi.com*" OR Processes.process="*g.api.mega.co.nz*" OR (Processes.process="*Bearer*" AND Processes.process="*Invoke-RestMethod*") OR (Processes.process="*Invoke-WebRequest*" AND Processes.process="*Authorization*" AND Processes.process="*OneDrive*")) by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | join type=outer host [| tstats summariesonly=t values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.app="powershell.exe" AND (All_Traffic.dest IN ("*graph.microsoft.com","*onedrive.live.com","*api.onedrive.com","*dropboxapi.com","*mega.nz","*mega.co.nz")) by host] | where isnotnull(dest_ip) | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// POLONIUM CreepyDrive/CreepyBox: PowerShell talking REST to OneDrive/Dropbox/Mega APIs
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let CloudC2Hosts = dynamic(["graph.microsoft.com","api.onedrive.com","onedrive.live.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","api-content.dropbox.com","g.api.mega.co.nz","eu.api.mega.co.nz"]);
let CloudC2Tokens = dynamic(["graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/drive","api.onedrive.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","g.api.mega.co.nz"]);
// 1. PowerShell command lines that embed cloud-storage REST endpoints + auth (CreepyDrive/CreepyBox shape)
let SuspectProc =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell_ise.exe")
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (CloudC2Tokens)
       or (ProcessCommandLine has "Invoke-RestMethod" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Bearer ","Authorization","access_token"))
       or (ProcessCommandLine has "Invoke-WebRequest" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Bearer ","OneDrive","Dropbox","sharedAccessSignature"))
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountUpn,
              ProcessId, ProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
// 2. Confirm the same host actually beaconed to the cloud API (kills LOLscript false positives)
let ConfirmNet =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell_ise.exe")
    | where RemoteUrl has_any (CloudC2Hosts)
           or RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
    | project NetTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort,
              NetProcessId = InitiatingProcessId;
SuspectProc
| join kind=inner ConfirmNet on DeviceId
| where NetTime between (Timestamp .. Timestamp + 30m)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(NetTime),
            BeaconCount = count(),
            DistinctMinutes = dcount(bin(NetTime, 1m)),
            CloudHosts = make_set(RemoteUrl, 25),
            SampleCmd = any(ProcessCommandLine),
            Parent = any(Parent)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine
| where BeaconCount >= 5 and DistinctMinutes >= 3   // sustained pattern, not one-off
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// POLONIUM CreepyDrive/CreepyBox — Sentinel port via SecurityEvent 4688 + ASIM ImNetworkSession
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let CloudC2Hosts = dynamic(["graph.microsoft.com","api.onedrive.com","onedrive.live.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","api-content.dropbox.com","g.api.mega.co.nz","eu.api.mega.co.nz"]);
let CloudC2Tokens = dynamic(["graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/drive","api.onedrive.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","g.api.mega.co.nz"]);
let SuspectProc =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where NewProcessName endswith "powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "pwsh.exe"
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where CommandLine has_any (CloudC2Tokens)
       or (CommandLine has "Invoke-RestMethod" and CommandLine has_any ("Bearer ","Authorization","access_token"))
       or (CommandLine has "Invoke-WebRequest" and CommandLine has_any ("Bearer ","OneDrive","Dropbox"))
    | project ProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, CommandLine,
              Parent = ParentProcessName, ProcId = NewProcessId;
let ConfirmNet =
    ImNetworkSession
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActingProcessName has_any ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
    | where DstHostname has_any (CloudC2Hosts) or Url has_any (CloudC2Hosts)
    | project NetTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, DstHostname, DstIpAddr, Url;
SuspectProc
| join kind=inner ConfirmNet on $left.Computer == $right.DvcHostname
| where NetTime between (ProcTime .. ProcTime + 30m)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(ProcTime), LastSeen = max(NetTime),
            BeaconCount = count(),
            DistinctMinutes = dcount(bin(NetTime, 1m)),
            CloudHosts = make_set(DstHostname, 25),
            SampleCmd = any(CommandLine)
            by Computer, Account, CommandLine
| where BeaconCount >= 5 and DistinctMinutes >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: POLONIUM CreepyDrive/CreepyBox PowerShell C2 over Cloud Storage APIs
id: 1c3f8e5a-7b21-4a1f-9b02-polonium-creepydrive
status: experimental
description: Detects POLONIUM (Plaid Rain) custom PowerShell implants (CreepyDrive, CreepyBox, CreepySnail) that abuse OneDrive/Graph, Dropbox or Mega REST APIs for bidirectional C2 and exfiltration.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/02/exposing-polonium-activity-and-infrastructure-targeting-israeli-organizations/
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/2022/10/11/polonium-targets-israel-creepy-malware/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1005/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.exfiltration
  - attack.t1102.002
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - detection.threat_hunting
  - actor.polonium
  - actor.plaid_rain
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_image:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\powershell_ise.exe'
  selection_cloud_api:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/drive'
      - 'api.onedrive.com'
      - 'content.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'g.api.mega.co.nz'
  selection_rest_auth:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'Invoke-RestMethod'
      - 'Invoke-WebRequest'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'Bearer '
      - 'Authorization'
  filter_machine:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_image and (selection_cloud_api or selection_rest_auth) and not filter_machine
falsepositives:
  - Authorized administrative scripts using Microsoft Graph for OneDrive backup
  - SaaS integration tools that legitimately hold OAuth tokens in the command line (rare; should not embed tokens in cmdline)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Microsoft (June 2022) and ESET (Oct 2022) both attributed the CreepyDrive (OneDrive C2), CreepyBox / CreepySnail (Dropbox & Mega C2) PowerShell implants exclusively to POLONIUM/Plaid Rain operations against Israeli targets. Embedding cloud-storage REST endpoints alongside Bearer tokens in a powershell.exe command line — and then confirming sustained beaconing back to those exact hosts from the sam

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession, SecurityEvent; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.

_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] POLONIUM trusted-relationship VPN logon followed by tunnel/reverse-proxy deployment (Plink/Chisel/Ligolo/Mesh)
ucs.description: Hunts POLONIUM's documented initial-access chain: stolen Fortinet/SSL-VPN credentials (often obtained via a compromised Israeli IT service provider — T1199) used for a remote-interactive logon, immediately followed by deployment of a reverse tunnel or proxy (Plink, Chisel, Ligolo, ngrok, MeshAgent — all observed in POLONIUM intrusions) so the operator can reach internal-only systems.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as logonTime from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success Authentication.authentication_method IN ("NTLM","Kerberos","Interactive","RemoteInteractive") (Authentication.app="FortiGate*" OR Authentication.app="GlobalProtect" OR Authentication.app="OpenVPN" OR Authentication.signature_id="4624") by Authentication.user Authentication.dest Authentication.src | rename Authentication.user as user Authentication.dest as dest Authentication.src as src | eval logonWindowStart=logonTime, logonWindowEnd=logonTime+1800 | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as procTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("plink.exe","chisel.exe","ligolo.exe","ligolo-ng.exe","ngrok.exe","frpc.exe","frps.exe","meshagent.exe","meshagent64.exe") OR (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" AND (Processes.process="*chisel*" OR Processes.process="*ligolo*" OR Processes.process="*ngrok*" OR Processes.process="*-R *:*:*" OR Processes.process="*plink*")) OR Processes.process="*-pw *" AND Processes.process="*-R*" AND Processes.process="*:22*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`] | where procTime>=logonWindowStart AND procTime<=logonWindowEnd | table logonTime user src dest procTime process_name cmdline parent
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// POLONIUM trusted-relationship logon → tunnel install (Sentinel)
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowMin = 30m;
let TunnelBins = dynamic(["plink.exe","chisel.exe","ligolo.exe","ligolo-ng.exe","ngrok.exe","frpc.exe","frps.exe","meshagent.exe","meshagent64.exe","socat.exe","revsocks.exe"]);
let TunnelCmdTokens = dynamic(["chisel client","chisel server","ligolo","ngrok tcp","ngrok http"," -R 0.0.0.0"," -R *:*:","frpc.ini","meshcentral"]);
let RemoteLogons =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4624
    | where LogonType in (3, 10)         // Network / RemoteInteractive
    | where AccountType == "User"
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where isnotempty(IpAddress) and IpAddress !in ("-","::1","127.0.0.1")
    | project LogonTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, TargetUserName,
              IpAddress, LogonTypeName, AuthenticationPackageName;
let TunnelExec =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName has_any (TunnelBins))
       or (NewProcessName endswith "powershell.exe" and CommandLine has_any (TunnelCmdTokens))
       or (CommandLine has " -R " and CommandLine has_any (":22",":443",":3389","0.0.0.0:"))
    | project ProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
RemoteLogons
| join kind=inner TunnelExec on Computer, Account
| where ProcTime between (LogonTime .. LogonTime + WindowMin)
| extend DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', ProcTime, LogonTime)
| project LogonTime, ProcTime, DelaySec, Computer, Account, IpAddress,
          LogonTypeName, AuthenticationPackageName,
          NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName
| order by LogonTime desc
ucs.rationale: Microsoft attributed POLONIUM intrusions to compromised Fortinet/SSL-VPN credentials harvested via downstream-vendor (T1199) trusted-relationship abuse, repeatedly observing the operator deploy MeshAgent, reverse-tunnel utilities and AnyDesk-class proxies within minutes of a successful remote logon to bridge inside the network. The 30-minute correlation between an external-IP RemoteInteractive/Net
